# Incremental index sync classifies external file changes.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
exec pinax note new Alpha --body '# Alpha' --vault vault --json
exec pinax note new Beta --body '# Beta' --vault vault --json
exec pinax index rebuild --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"index.rebuild"'

rm vault/notes/beta.md
-- vault/notes/alpha.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_alpha
title: Alpha
tags: []
---

# Alpha
changed body
-- vault/notes/gamma.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_gamma
title: Gamma
tags: []
---

# Gamma

exec pinax index sync --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=index.sync'
stdout 'fact.created=1'
stdout 'fact.changed=1'
stdout 'fact.deleted=1'
stdout 'fact.failed=0'

exec pinax search changed --vault vault --json
stdout '"returned":"1"'
stdout 'notes/alpha.md'
